headline: ₹10-50 Cr at risk if duties escalate or avoidance strategies fail. — Waaree Energies explores strategies to mitigate US duties, with limited immediate ESG or financial impact.
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, CDP, TCFD frameworks noted, but no regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
No P/E compression or margin erosion at this stage; revenue at risk is not quantifiable.
No direct cost of capital impact; possible future implications if disclosure lapses occur.
